facebook.caption: Tourists walk straight past this one. Thanh Kieu Beach Resort sits on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and keeps a low profile while the crowds pile into the big-name hotels nearby. 4.4 stars across 903 reviews. That's not luck, that's consistency. Beach access, resort feel, without the resort markup energy. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walking into Thanh Kieu Beach Resort while everyone else queues at the tourist traps. 903 reviews say they got it right. Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, Phu Quoc. Go find it.
